name: Occidental Petroleum Corporation
description: Occidental Petroleum Corporation is an international energy company with assets primarily in the United States, the Middle East, and North Africa. For over a century, the company has focused on oil and gas exploration and production while increasingly leveraging its expertise to advance carbon management technologies. Occidental is actively pursuing a net-zero strategy by integrating carbon capture, utilization, and storage (CCUS) and direct air capture solutions into its operations. Through its commitment to innovation and sustainability, the company aims to provide reliable energy while reducing greenhouse gas emissions and addressing global environmental challenges.
